description: Financial product catalogue and per-customer product holdings.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List the financial product catalogue, optionally filtered by category.

category.description: Optional category filter — 'current_account', 'savings', 'childrens_savings' or 'credit_card' (case-insensitive). Omit to list every product.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get a single product definition by code (or exact name).

product_code.description: The product code (e.g. 'GOLDCARD') or exact product name (e.g. 'GoldCard').

tools.name: list_holdings
tools.description: List the product holdings a customer currently has.

tools.name: detect_opportunities
tools.description: Detect proactive optimisation opportunities for a customer: idle cash on low-interest holdings (with estimated annual interest gain) and a credit-card candidate when none is held.

liquidity_buffer.description: Cash to leave on the current account for liquidity when computing the movable idle amount.

min_idle_balance.description: Only flag a holding whose balance exceeds this.

min_annual_gain.description: Only flag an idle-cash opportunity whose estimated annual gain is at least this (EUR).

tools.name: order_product
tools.description: Order a new product for a customer (write — human-in-the-loop).

confirm.description: Set to true only after a human has approved the preview.

tools.name: update_holding
tools.description: Update an existing product holding (write — human-in-the-loop).

fields.description: Mapping of field name to new value (subset of 'status', 'credit_limit', 'iban', 'card_number').

confirm.description: Set to true only after a human has approved the preview.
